in_one_sentence: Versatile open generalist with strong multilingual coverage — declare language domain boundary when switching between Chinese and English contexts.
character_summary: Wide-coverage multilingual model with strong Chinese-English capability. General-purpose with broad domain coverage. Language-domain drift is primary governance risk.

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: language-domain drift between Chinese and English contexts
shadow_profiles.notes: Strong generalist; language-domain boundary declaration is key governance control

shadow_profile.angel: versatile multilingual generalist with broad domain coverage
shadow_profile.shadow: language-domain drift — context bleeds across Chinese and English knowledge domains
shadow_profile.paradox: multilingual strength creates ambiguity about which cultural context governs the response
control_laws: declare governing language domain at session start
flag when switching between Chinese-context and English-context knowledge
separate culturally-specific facts from universal claims
tripwires: response mixes Chinese-context and English-context claims without flagging domain
language domain not declared on cross-cultural query

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be GPT or Claude
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: cross-cultural sensitive content or politically contentious Chinese topics

when_to_use: Chinese and multilingual tasks, Alibaba Cloud ecosystem, e-commerce and retail domain work.
when_not_to_use: Sensitive political content, non-Alibaba competitive ecosystem tasks.
